title: Factor Parameters — Materials & Products (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'materials_products'. Aligned with ISO 14067:2018, EN 15804+A2, and WBCSD PACT Pathfinder v2.0. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

boundary.description: LCA system boundary. 'cradle_to_gate' = resource extraction to factory gate; 'gate_to_gate' = one life-cycle stage only; 'cradle_to_grave' = full life cycle including use + EoL.

allocation_method.description: Co-product allocation approach per ISO 14044. 'mass' splits by output mass share; 'economic' by output revenue share; 'system_expansion' assigns credit for avoided production; 'physical' uses a non-mass physical relationship; 'substitution' replaces an avoided product.

recycled_content_assumption.description: Assumed recycled content share (0.0 = virgin, 1.0 = fully recycled). Required when the factor is labelled 'recycled_content'.

supplier_primary_data_share.description: Share of inputs backed by primary supplier-reported data (PACT Pathfinder attribute). 0.0 = fully secondary; 1.0 = fully primary.

epd_reference.description: EPD identifier when this factor derives from a specific Environmental Product Declaration.

pact_compatible.description: True when the factor satisfies PACT Pathfinder Framework v2.0 conformance rules (verification, primary data share, etc.).
